calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT EUROMOTORS, INC.'s MOTION TO TRANSFER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Euromotors, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to transfer venue to San Mateo County" is granted. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
